# Holo Forensics v0.1.2

## ✨ What's Changed

- Refined the desktop About dialog for a cleaner project summary and repo-link presentation.
- Reworked the root README so the Windows desktop workflow is the primary entry point.
- Moved build, CLI, and technical-reference material into the wiki home page to keep the README user-facing.
- Added a current evidence-scope review screenshot so the desktop collection flow is easier to evaluate at a glance.

## 🧪 Release Notes

- This release is focused on UX and documentation polish.
- Collector and parser coverage are unchanged from v0.1.1.
